creator: mathemajikian@gmail.com
text:
Try and run myth2_demo instead. If that does not work then I may need to 
ensure that the patches are correctly applied. I had no issues running the 
demo. I also have the full retail working with no problems. Let me know if 
you have any other problems.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------
Turn Linux into a BSD boot-loader, install OpenBSD on your Zaurus TODAY!!!
www.openbsd.org/zaurus.html
-------------------------------------------------------------------------

On Sun, 8 Oct 2006, Alejandro Pulver wrote:

> Hello.
>
> When I try to run it, the following happens:
>
> % myth2_demo.x86
> Warning: You may not have enough free memory (0) !
> 10.08.2006 14:35:33  Myth II running under Linux ------------
> Scanning for software devices...
>        Found 1 to use
>
> BUG! (Segmentation Fault)  Going down hard...
> Myth II: Soulblighter Demo 1.3e
> Built with glibc-2.1 on x86
> Stack dump:
> {
>        0xbfbfffbf
>        0x806ec10
>        0x8120c23
>        0x806bb6f
>        0x806b51f
>        0x806d1bd
>        0x806db26
>        0x283602e7
>        0x804ee51

> Please send a full bug report,
> along with the contents of autosave to: support@lokigames.com
> Unable to execute loki_qagent - exiting
>
> Does it also happen to you?
>
> Best Regards,
> Ale
